seo.title: Nick Kosarev — Fullstack Developer
seo.description: Fullstack Developer specializing in Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Building modern web applications.

hero.name: Nick Kosarev
hero.description: Fullstack Developer building modern web applications with Vue, Nuxt, and TypeScript. Passionate about clean architecture, great UX, and open source.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of things I've built and contributed to.

meloteka.description: Music catalog and streaming service. Includes web app, Telegram Mini App, admin panel, Subsonic API compatibility, and audio transcoding pipeline.

startodel.description: Ready-made website platform for food delivery businesses. Zero commission, real-time menu management, loyalty programs, Telegram notifications, and multi-language support.

chatgame.description: Interactive Twitch chat game with real-time gameplay. Viewers interact with the stream through chat commands.

skills.title: Skills & Stack
skills.description: Technologies I work with on a daily basis.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Open for collaboration and interesting projects.

cv.title: CV
cv.seoDescription: Fullstack Developer with 15+ years of experience. Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes.
cv.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
cv.aboutText: In development since 2010 — from PHP freelancing to SaaS products on Vue/Nuxt and Kubernetes. Founded three businesses, launched a food delivery platform with 500+ clients. Currently building Стартодел and Мелотека, focused on the Vue/Nuxt ecosystem and DevOps practices. Streaming live coding on Twitch and contributing to open source.
cv.educationText: Syktyvkar State University — Applied Mathematics and Computer Science

startodel.description: Founded a commercial SaaS product for launching food delivery websites. Building the platform, acquiring first customers and shaping product strategy.
highlights: Designed and built the platform from scratch: SEO optimization (individual product pages, Schema.org), responsive design, 60-second checkout
Implemented 3 pricing tiers with 0% order commission, Telegram notifications, no-code menu management
Integrated online payments, loyalty programs, and multi-channel support (up to 8 channels)

meloteka.description: Built a cloud platform for managing personal music collections. No ads, no algorithms — full user control over their library.
highlights: Developed full pipeline: FLAC/MP3/OGG upload, transcoding, browser streaming from any device, lossless playback
Integrated MusicBrainz catalog (127,000+ artists), ListenBrainz scrobbling, Telegram Mini App
Implemented S3 storage on Yandex Cloud, 3 subscription tiers

sushilove.description: Sole developer in the company. Covered the full cycle: from auditing existing websites to building internal services and team tools.
highlights: Integrated PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ for async task processing — improved internal service reliability and speed
Audited Bitrix and Tilda websites: fixed 12 critical bugs, improved page load speed by 50%
Created Telegram Mini App for team task management: assignment, statuses, deadlines, KPI monitoring
Implemented reporting system: 5+ report types for plan execution, employee workload, and partner performance

o5.description: Key developer in the product team. Went from first commit to a scalable platform with hundreds of business clients in Russia's food delivery segment.
highlights: Built and launched the o5.Food platform from scratch
Rewrote core system from PHP/jQuery to TypeScript/React/NestJS. Evaluated WebAssembly and Serverless for critical modules
Implemented scalable Kubernetes architecture — handling growing traffic without downtime, reducing hosting costs
Acquired 500+ business clients, earned thousands of positive user reviews

berry.description: Co-founded a web development agency with a partner over 2.5 years. Managed projects from sales and estimation to development and delivery.
highlights: Delivered 20+ websites for businesses (retail, services)
Enhanced existing sites: fixed bugs, implemented lead forms, calculators, payment integrations
One-third of clients returned for new projects

freelance.description: The start of my web development career. Found clients independently, managed projects end-to-end and maintained server infrastructure.
highlights: Launched 20+ websites on PHP+jQuery: corporate portals and e-commerce stores
Managed infrastructure: domains, DNS, hosting (Apache/Nginx), uptime > 99%

twitch.description: Regular weekday streams. Writing code live on camera, ~15 average viewers. Building interactive viewer apps.
highlights: Built Twitch API integration: real-time viewer data, chat messages, and stream events processing
Developed ChatGame (24 ★ on GitHub) — Telegram Mini App with WebSockets: stream room sync, OAuth authentication, inventory and trophy system

nextorders.description: Open-source food delivery automation platform. Exploring the full development cycle in foodtech and practicing modern technologies.
highlights: Designed platform with responsive design, SSR rendering, 11+ language support and multi-regional capabilities
Implemented conversion features: 'Frequently bought together', product videos, ingredient details, persistent cart, instant search, guest checkout
